Advanced Medicine

Welcome to my website where you can find all the information about the treatments performed in my clinic.

Book Appointment

Our Clinic

1. In-Depth Initial Medical Evaluation

Unlike a medical model often constrained by time, understanding the etiology of your condition requires really getting to know the patient. That is why we take all the necessary time to dive deeply not just into your medical biography, but also your family history, living environment, and full context. Understanding where you live, how you interact, and what challenges you've faced gives us crucial diagnostic clues that are often overlooked.

2. Precision Medical Diagnosis

After the initial clinical analysis, we apply cutting-edge technology for a comprehensive functional evaluation. Our Medical Diagnosis via MORA ® Bio-Resonance allows objective analysis of cellular and systemic activity, identifying imbalances, toxic loads, intolerances, or interfering foci that are not always detectable by conventional methods. This step is crucial to precisely determine the etiology (root cause) of your pathology.

Learn about our diagnostic methodology

3. Personalized Therapeutic Strategy

Based on the clinical and functional evidence obtained, we design a rigorous and specific therapeutic strategy for each patient. We do not offer generic solutions, but individualized treatment plans that may integrate different modalities, such as Clinical Homeopathy, advanced Detoxification protocols, or our effective Anti-Smoking Treatment, to restore homeostasis and promote a stable and lasting recovery.

Explore our treatment areas

Family Medicine

Children, allergies, asthma and digestive disorders such as intolerances, skin problems, and any other organ etc.

ABOUT US

Clinic specialized in finding the cause of the disease, providing solutions to problems, diseases and blockages.

The human being is a WHOLE.
You cannot separate the physical part from their emotional, mental, or even spiritual system.
"There is no physical disease without a correlating mental or emotional symptom"
nor on the contrary
"a mental or emotional symptom without a physical symptom".
It is important to investigate and treat this synchronization to recover health and harmony at all levels.
Why do I get sick?
Why does what I have happen to me?
Why do symptoms persist over time?
What does this disease mean?
Everything is related since EVERYTHING is in ONE.
Helping you uncover this is my work and specialty.

Personalized Attention

Dedicating the necessary time to fully understand your situation, backed by a complete Medical History.

Comprehensive Diagnosis

I conduct a complete systemic diagnosis (of the entire body) investigating the root causes of your illness or ailment.

Medical Specialties

I employ advancements in Electromagnetic Medicine alongside over 40 years of experience practicing Homeopathic Medicine.

Degree in Medicine and Surgery from the University of the Basque Country (Spain), and since 1984, I have been dedicated to the practice of Medicine in my clinic.

Diplomas and Specializations

  • Diploma in Homeopathy by the Spanish Medical Association of Homeopathy and Biotherapy A.M.E.B. (Spain).
  • Associate member of the Faculty of Homeopathy, London.
  • Diploma in Homeopathy by the Homeoform Association (Homeopathie Post-Universitaire (Geneva) H.P.U.
  • Diploma in Homo-toxicology (Spain).
  • Diploma in Mora Bioresonance since 1990

Positions and Professional Recognitions

  • Founder and Former President of the Homeopathy Collegiate Section of the Official College of Physicians of Vizcaya.
  • Coordinator of Perfection Studies at the Homeoform Association.
  • General Secretary of the Homeoform Association.

Teaching

  • Assistant Professor of Homeopathy at the Homeopathie Post-Universitaire (Spain).
  • Assistant Professor of Homeopathy at the Homeoform Association (Spain).

I have a degree in psychology from the University of Deusto, Bilbao, and I dedicate myself to the practice of psychology, homeopathy, and detoxification, anti-smoking, and addiction treatments in our clinic.

Diplomas and Specializations

  • Diploma in Biotherapy by the Spanish Medical Association of Biotherapy (Spain).
  • Diploma in Homeopathy by the Homeoform association.
  • Diploma in MORA Bio-resonance in 2011.

Professional Experience

  • Since 1994, dedicated to the practice of Homeopathic Medicine, with a clinic in Granada, Spain.
  • Since 2001, specialized in performing anti-smoking treatment therapy.

“Before curing anyone, ask him if he is willing to give up the things that made him sick.”

— Hippocrates

“Health depends on being in harmony with our souls.”

— Edward Bach

“Medicine must integrate body, soul and spirit so that the treatment is true and lasting.”

— Rudolf Steiner

“The true doctor not only prescribes, but listens, understands and guides towards balance.”

— Anonymous

“Homeopathy does not treat diseases, but people who are sick.”

— André Saine

“The body whispers before it screams; the attentive doctor listens to the silence of the disease before it manifests.”

— Proposed Quote

“Technology heals, chemistry acts, but the soul is cured in the presence of love and listening.”

— Proposed Quote

“The physician's high and only mission is to restore the sick to health, to cure, as it is termed.”

— Samuel Hahnemann

“The good physician treats the disease; the great physician treats the patient who has the disease.”

— William Osler
